subject: humor and trump and evolutionary logic
body:
was pleased that Robert Lynch's work and my own were cited in a Nation article on the lack of humor of our Republican standard bearer

https://www.thenation.com/article/have-you-ever-seen-donald-trump-laugh/

congratulations Robert

John and Jeffrey, i will write you shortly
